overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious rooftop terrace in a futuristic cyberpunk city, featuring a reflecting pool, modern lounge furniture with yellow umbrellas, and sculptural trees overlooking a dense urban skyline. The footage displays high-end game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and cinematic lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious rooftop pool deck with a large reflecting pool surrounded by palm trees. The camera walks forward along a wooden deck toward a modern building, with a dense cyberpunk city skyline visible in the background. Black Arasaka crates are stacked along the right side of the path.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a rooftop lounge area featuring rows of wooden deck chairs shaded by large yellow umbrellas. The camera walks along the wooden deck between the seating areas, passing an outdoor bar on the left. The modern building remains visible to the left while Arasaka crates appear on both sides of the walkway.

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a rooftop garden area with sculptural trees in large planters and paved tile flooring. The camera walks toward a red canopy structure where two figures stand overlooking the city. A secondary water feature is visible through the trees at the overlook point, with the cyberpunk skyline dominating the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a luxurious rooftop terrace that evolves from a serene pool deck into a sophisticated garden overlook. It begins by gliding along a wooden deck beside a large reflecting pool and palm trees, moving past stacked Arasaka crates toward a modern building against a dense cyberpunk skyline. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a lounge area where the path winds between rows of deck chairs shaded by large yellow umbrellas and passes an outdoor bar. The scene then opens into a rooftop garden with sculptural trees in large planters and paved tile flooring, before finally approaching a red canopy structure where two figures stand overlooking the sprawling city and a secondary water feature.
